items.claim: Monty's is known for putting himself in bad positions with his high-pressure wrestling game.
items.quote: he's taking on a guy that is known for putting himself in some bad spots with this highressuring wrestling game.

items.claim: Ricky Tersios puts his head in bad spots during scrambles.
items.quote: Ricky Tersios is a scrambling guy, but he puts his head in bad spots.

items.claim: Monty's has been rocked on the regional scene.
items.quote: we have seen him rocked on the regional scene.

items.claim: Monty's has a career loss by TKO in the second round.
items.quote: His long career losses by TKO like 12 seconds into the second round.

items.claim: Tommy McMillan has never been knocked out.
Jose Delgado is easy to take down.
items.quote: Jose Delgado is easy to take down

items.claim: Austin Bashi struggles to maintain his pace in later rounds.
items.quote: there may be a little bit of an inability to keep that pace up.

items.claim: Jose Delgado missed weight in his fight against Nathaniel Wood.
items.quote: he actually missed the mark coming in at 147 against Nathaniel Wood

items.claim: Jose Delgado's weight cuts are becoming more difficult as he fills out his frame.
items.quote: I don't really think that these weight cuts are really uh all that easy. They keep getting more difficult.

items.claim: Chris Mott successfully took down and held down Jose Delgado in their regional fight.
items.quote: Chris Mott... just takes down Delgado at will and then actually has way more success holding him down.

items.claim: Austin Bashi scored 10 takedowns in an eight-minute fight on the Contender Series.
items.quote: when we was on the Contender series, that fight was eight minutes long. He scored 10 takedowns in those eight minutes.
